name: nostr-merchant
summary: A local-first AI agent that runs a business on NOSTR: checks its Lightning wallet, publishes notes and listings, answers encrypted DMs, and pays for paywalled MCP tools over NWC — all under sats budget caps it can't exceed. Drives five MCP servers (nwc-mcp, nostr-ops-mcp, marketplace-mcp, albyhub-admin-mcp, paywall-mcp). Ollama-first, API-pluggable. Built on pydantic-ai — no LangChain. MIT.
author: LLMOps.Pro
